title: Songs Set To Music: 11. Set By Mr. De Fesch
content:
Morella, charming without art,
And kind without design,
Can never lose the smallest part
Of such a heart as mine.

Obliged a thousand several ways,
It ne'er can break her chains,
While passion which her beauties raise
My gratitude maintains.
meaning:
"Songs Set To Music: 11. Set By Mr. De Fesch" is a quintessential example of Matthew Prior's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
